summary: Seeded envelope. A general-purpose home robot that folds laundry, loads the dishwasher, and tidies — at $200/mo. Live web research has not run yet; invoke 'npm run research -- --id robotics_household_general_purpose' to populate citations.

dead_saas_matches.rationale: Risk profile overlaps Builder.ai (Business model fraud — human labor disguised as AI; lack of financial governance).
Risk profile overlaps Lilium (Hardware scaling chasm; regulatory delays; capital intensity exceeded projections).
